name: Historic Tapoco Lodge
description: Come play pickleball at Historic Tapoco Lodge in Robbinsville, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Mountain View School Campground And Sanctuary
description: Mountain View School Campground And Sanctuary is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Robbinsville, NC. There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is free.
